_readme: Cmd+Shift+P → 'Continue: Open config.json'   (or Ctrl+Shift+P on Windows)
3. Replace the entire file contents with this JSON (remove this _readme key first).
4. Make sure your router is running:  cd ai-router && python3 main.py
'Auto Route'     — router decides based on your rules (recommended for daily use)
'Local (Ollama)' — always uses local Ollama, zero API cost, fast for small tasks
'Cloud GPT-4o'   — always uses cloud OpenAI gpt-4o, best quality
'Cloud GPT-4o-mini' — cloud but cheap, good for chat/explain tasks
Always goes to local (Ollama) — keeps autocomplete instant and free.
Change model to 'codellama' or 'qwen2.5-coder' for better code completion:

models.title: Auto Route
models.systemMessage: You are an expert software engineer. Be concise, precise, and always show working code.
models._comment: No X-Route-To header — router applies your rules: keywords, token length, time-of-day

slashCommands.name: comment
slashCommands.description: Add comments to the highlighted code

customCommands.name: review
customCommands.prompt: Review this code for correctness, performance, and security issues. Be specific about line numbers. Use cloud for this.

customCommands.name: test
customCommands.prompt: Write comprehensive unit tests for this code. Cover edge cases, error paths, and happy paths. Use pytest if Python, Jest if JavaScript.

customCommands.name: docstring
customCommands.prompt: Add clear docstrings/JSDoc to this code. Match the existing style. Keep it concise.

customCommands.name: explain
customCommands.prompt: Explain what this code does in plain English. Start with a one-line summary, then give details.

customCommands.name: fix
customCommands.prompt: Find and fix the bug in this code. Show the fixed version and explain what was wrong.
